episode.title: MTGFastFinance Ep 422: Equinox Secret Lair Super Drop
episode.description: James and Cliff get you caught up on all the latest in MTGFinance news, fast movers, cards to watch and give your their take on the new Secret Lair Equinox Superdrop release.
